code: build_graph_from_mat(   mat,   transfrom.method = c("none", "scale", "center", "log2", "log10", "ln", "rrarefy",     "rrarefy_relative"),   r.threshold = 0.7,   p.threshold = 0.05,   method = c("WGCNA", "SpiecEasi", "SPARCC", "cor", "Hmisc"),   cor.method = c("pearson", "kendall", "spearman"),   proc = c("holm", "hochberg", "hommel", "bonferroni", "BH", "BY", "fdr", "none"),   module.method = c("Fast_greedy", "Walktrap", "Edge_betweenness", "Spinglass"),   SpiecEasi.method = c("mb", "glasso"),   sparcc_R = 20,   node_annotation = NULL,   top_modules = 15,   seed = 1115 )

title: Build a correlation-based network from a matrix — build_graph_from_mat
text: mat Numeric matrix. numeric matrix samples colums variables rows transfrom.method Character. Data transformation methods applied correlation analysis. Options include: "none" (raw data), "scale" (z-score standardization), "center" (mean centering ), "log2" (log2 transfrom), "log10" (log10 transfrom), "ln" (natural transfrom ), "rrarefy" (random rarefaction using vegan::rrarefy), "rrarefy_relative" (rarefy convert relative abundance). r.threshold Numeric. Correlation coefficient threshold; edges kept |r| >= r.threshold. p.threshold Numeric. Significance threshold correlations; edges kept p < p.threshold. method Character. Relationship analysis methods. Options include: "WGCNA", "SpiecEasi", "SPARCC", "cor", "Hmisc". cor.method Character. Correlation analysis method. Options include "pearson", "kendall", "spearman". proc Character. Correlation p-value adjustment methods. Options include: "holm", "hochberg", "hommel", "bonferroni", "BH", "", "fdr", "none". module.method Character. Network community detection (module identification) method. Options include "Fast_greedy", "Walktrap", "Edge_betweenness", "Spinglass". SpiecEasi.method Character. Method used SpiecEasi network inference; options include "mb" "glasso". sparcc_R Integer. Number bootstrap/permutation replicates SparCC p-values (method = "SPARCC"). Default 20. node_annotation Data frame. Optional node annotation table, containing metadata taxonomy functional categories. top_modules Integer. Number top-ranked modules retain downstream visualization analysis. seed Integer (default = 1115). Random seed reproducibility.

text: mat Numeric matrix. Required graph_obj_list NULL. numeric matrix variables (e.g. genes, taxa) rows samples columns. group_info DataFrame. Required graph_obj_list NULL. group information contains: Sample Group. Sample Group contain underscores (_), automatically replaced hyphens (-) avoid parsing issues; mat column names, order, comparisons_groups updated accordingly. graph_obj_list Named list tbl_graph objects. Alternative mat group_info. element graph object (e.g. build_graph_from_mat build_graph_from_df). List names define group names (e.g. list(WT = g1, KO = g2)). provided, mat group_info ignored. Enables custom pre-built networks. transfrom.method Character. Data transformation methods applied correlation analysis. Options include: "none" (raw data), "scale" (z-score standardization), "center" (mean centering ), "log2" (log2 transfrom), "log10" (log10 transfrom), "ln" (natural transfrom ), "rrarefy" (random rarefaction using vegan::rrarefy), "rrarefy_relative" (rarefy convert relative abundance). r.threshold Numeric. Correlation coefficient threshold; edges kept |r| >= r.threshold. p.threshold Numeric. #' Significance threshold correlations; edges kept p < p.threshold. method Character. Relationship analysis methods. Options include: "WGCNA", "SpiecEasi", "SPARCC" "cor". cor.method Character. Correlation analysis method. Options include "pearson", "kendall", "spearman". proc Character. Correlation p-value adjustment methods. Options include: "holm", "hochberg", "hommel", "bonferroni", "BH", "", "fdr", "none". module.method Character. Network community detection (module identification) method. Options include "Fast_greedy", "Walktrap", "Edge_betweenness", "Spinglass". SpiecEasi.method Character. Method used SpiecEasi network inference; options include "mb" "glasso". sparcc_R Integer. Number bootstrap/permutation replicates SparCC p-values (method = "SPARCC"). Default 20. node_annotation Data frame. Optional node annotation table, containing metadata taxonomy functional categories. top_modules Integer. Number top-ranked modules retain downstream visualization analysis. layout Character string. Custom layouts; one "gephi", "square", "square2", "petal", "petal2", "heart_centered","diamond", "star", "star_concentric","rectangle, "rightiso_layers" etc. node_add Integer (default = 7). Number nodes add layer layout. ring_n Numeric (default = 7) Numbers ring rings layout. r Numeric (default = 1). Radius increment concentric layered layouts. center Logical (default = TRUE). Whether place node center layout. idx Optional. Index nodes emphasized centered layout shrink Numeric (default = 1). Shrinkage factor applied center points. k_nn Numeric (default = 8). Number nearest neighbors used build local adjacency graph. push_others_delta Numeric (default = 0). Radial offset applied "Others" module slightly layout.module Character  (default = "random") - random : modules distributed randomly independently. - adjacent : modules positioned close , minimizing inter-module gaps. - order : modules distributed order, applicable `Bipartite, Tripartite, Quadripartite, Multipartite, Pentapartite Layout` group.Character (default = "Modularity"). Change group nodes fill.Character (default = "Modularity"). Change fill nodes fill Named vector colors node/module fill (e.g. c("M1" = "red", "M2" = "blue")). NULL (default), uses viridis discrete fill scale (scale_fill_viridis_d); provided, uses scale_fill_manual(values = fill). color Color setting node/module border. Supports either single color string (fixed border color) named vector (module--color mapping, similar fill). NULL, mapped borders use viridis discrete color scale (scale_color_viridis_d). pointsize Numeric vector length 2 (default = c(1, 5)). range point size mapping Degree size. First value minimum size, second maximum size. jitter Logical (default = FALSE). Whether apply jitter points. jitter_sd Integer  (default = 0.1). standard deviation jitter applied `jitter = TRUE`. mapping_line Logical Character (default = FALSE). Whether map line color ggNetView. character string provided, must variable name edge data. linealpha Integer  (default = 0.25). Change  line alpha. linecolor Character  (default = "grey70"). Change  line color. inner_curve Logical (default = FALSE). Whether draw within-group edges curves. inner_curvature Numeric (default = 0.12). Curvature within-group edges inner_curve = TRUE. inner_curve_adaptive Logical (default = TRUE). Whether adapt within-group edge curvature edge length inner_curve = TRUE. inner_curve_adaptive_range Numeric vector length 2 (default = c(0.7, 1.3)). Multipliers applied inner_curvature shortest longest within-group edges. inner_curve_adaptive_bins Integer (default = 7). Number bins used approximate per-edge adaptive curvature within-group edges. add_outer Logical Character (default = "circle"). Add outer boundaries matched modules. Supported values: "circle" (use ggforce::geom_mark_circle), "manual" (use smoothed polygon boundary like ggNetView), "none" (disable). Logical TRUE/FALSE accepted mapped "circle"/"none". q_outer Numeric (default = 0.88). Quantile radial distance used construct smooth outer boundary add_outer = "manual". expand_outer Numeric (default = 1.02). Global scaling factor applied smooth outer boundary add_outer = "manual". outerwidth Numeric (default = 1.25). Line width module outer boundaries. outerlinetype Integer character (default = 2). Linetype module outer boundaries (e.g. 1 = solid, 2 = dashed). outeralpha Numeric (default = 0.5). Alpha module outer boundaries. link_level Character (default = "Module"). Cross-group link granularity. One "None", "Module", "Node", "NodeinModule", "Module&Node", "Module&Node2". "None" draws cross-group links. "Module" links significant module matches (module centroids). "Node" links shared node names across groups. "NodeinModule" links module centroids nodes within significantly overlapping modules (module links show modules overlap; node links show shared nodes). "Module&Node" draws module-level links node-level links. "Module&Node2" "Module&Node" adds outer boundaries modules (matched ones). link_curve Logical (default = FALSE). Whether draw cross-group links curves (geom_curve) instead straight segments. link_curvature Numeric (default = 0.2). Curvature used link_curve = TRUE. link_curve_mode Character (default = "outward"). Curve direction strategy used link_curve = TRUE. "outward" bends links away global center. "inward" bends links toward global center. "cross" follows cross-axis rule: left links bend left, right links bend right, upper links bend , lower links bend . link_curve_adaptive Logical (default = TRUE). Whether adapt link curvature link length link_curve = TRUE. Longer links get larger curvature shorter links get smaller curvature. link_curve_adaptive_range Numeric vector length 2 (default = c(0.7, 1.3)). Multipliers applied link_curvature shortest longest links. first value minimum multiplier; second maximum multiplier. link_curve_adaptive_bins Integer (default = 7). Number bins used approximate per-link adaptive curvature. link_color_node Character NULL (default = NULL). Colors node--node cross-group links. NULL = use default palette. single value, named vector (e.g. c("WT|KO" = "red")), unnamed vector (pair index). link_color_module Character NULL (default = NULL). Colors module--module cross-group links. rules link_color_node. link_linewidth_node Numeric (default = 1). Line width node--node cross-group links. Single value vector (pair index/named). link_linewidth_module Numeric (default = 1). Line width module--module cross-group links. Single value vector. link_linetype_node Integer character (default = 2). Linetype node--node cross-group links (e.g. 2 = dashed, 1 = solid). Single value vector. link_linetype_module Integer character (default = 1). Linetype module--module cross-group links. Single value vector. link_linealpha_node Numeric (default = 0.25). Alpha (transparency) node--node cross-group links. Single value vector. link_linealpha_module Numeric (default = 0.5). Alpha (transparency) module--module cross-group links. Single value vector. dropOthers Logical (default = FALSE). TRUE, remove nodes "Others" module group's graph_obj layout, plotting, module-overlap comparison. calculate_topology Logical (default = FALSE). Whether compute topology group using get_network_topology_parallel() get_sample_subgraph_topology_parallel(). comparisons Logical (default = TRUE). Whether perform cross-group comparisons draw links. FALSE, module overlap node comparison done, cross-group links drawn. comparisons_groups List NULL (default = NULL). comparisons = TRUE, constrains group pairs compared. element must length-2 character vector, e.g. list(c("WT", "OE"), c("WT", "KO")). Group names must exist group_info$Group names(graph_obj_list). NULL, pairwise group comparisons performed. order Character vector NULL (default = NULL). Order groups layout positions. Groups placed evenly circle: 1st = top, 2nd = next clockwise, etc. (e.g. 3 groups = triangle, 4 = square). Must contain unique groups group_info$Group names(graph_obj_list) exactly . NULL, uses unique(group_info$Group) names(graph_obj_list) order (first occurrence). group_layout Character (default = "circle"). Arrangement groups multi-group plot. "circle": groups placed evenly circle (default). "row": groups grid, filled row--row; uses nrow ncol. "column": groups grid, filled column--column; uses nrow ncol. "square": 4 groups corners square (top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left). "diamond": 4 groups top, right, bottom, left (like rotated square). "triangle": 3 groups vertices upright triangle (point ). "triangle_down": 3 groups vertices inverted triangle (point ). "snake": groups grid snake-like ordering; first row left--right, second row right--left, third row left--right, etc. Uses nrow ncol. "snake_vertical": groups along smooth sine curve; uses sine_period. "snake_vertical_sin": "snake_vertical". "snake_vertical_cos": groups along smooth cosine curve; uses sine_period. "snake_vertical_neg_sin": smooth -sin curve. "snake_vertical_neg_cos": smooth -cos curve. "sin": vertex-; group 1 center; groups 2+ alternate peaks troughs. "cos": vertex-; group 1 peak; groups 2+ alternate peak trough. "-sin": vertex-; group 1 center; groups 2+ alternate , . "-cos": vertex-; group 1 trough; groups 2+ alternate trough peak. "center_pairs": group 1 center (y=0); remaining groups form pairs peak (y=1) trough (y=-1), one anchor_dist gap center first pair. Pairs alternate right/left center. pair one group, goes top (peak). Empty pair slots keep positions. scale_groups Logical (default = TRUE). Font size group labels (Group, Node, Edge, etc.). add_group_outer Logical (default = FALSE). Whether add circle boundary around group (mimics ggforce::geom_mark_circle). add_group_outer_expand Numeric (default = 2). Expansion mm group circle account point size; passed geom_mark_circle(expand = ...). add_group_outer_color Character (default = "grey50"). Color group outer circle border. single value applies groups; named vector maps group names colors (e.g. c("WT" = "blue", "KO" = "red")); unnamed vector used index (recycled needed). add_group_outer_fill Character NULL (default = NULL). Fill color group outer circle. NULL = fill (transparent). single value, named vector, unnamed vector works like add_group_outer_color. add_group_outer_fill_alpha Numeric (default = 0.2). One `"pearson"`, `"kendall"`, `"spearman"`. mantel.alternative Character Alternative hypothesis Mantel test. One `"two.sided"`, `"less"`, `"greater"`. drop_nonsig Logical `TRUE`, non-significant correlations dropped final visualization. comparisons Logical (default = TRUE). Whether perform species–environment correlation Mantel analysis. FALSE, spec–env links computed drawn. comparisons_groups List NULL (default = NULL). comparisons = TRUE, constrains (env_block, spec_block) pairs analyzed. element must length-2 character vector: c(env_block_name, spec_block_name), e.g. list(c("Env01", "Spec01"), c("Env02", "Spec01")). Block names must match names(env_select) names(spec_select). NULL, env–spec block pairs analyzed (default). shape Intrger Integer numeric specifying shape species nodes plot (passed `geom_point()`). distance Numeric offset distance central nodes environmental heatmaps. HeatmapLabelSize Numeric (default = 5) Text size heatmap axis labels (ID/Type). HeatmapSigSize Numeric (default = 5) Text size significance symbols (e.g. `*`, `**`, `***`) inside heatmap tiles. HeatmapColorBar NULL list Controls colorbar palettes used heatmap quadrant. - `NULL`, built-default palettes used (current behavior). - list length 2 names `low` `high`, character   vector colors (recycled shorter) used across quadrants. - list length equal number quadrants, element   either `c(low, high)` `list(low=..., high=...)` quadrant (order). - example `HeatmapColorBar = list(  c("#2166ac", "#b2182b"),  # 第1个象限 low/high  c("#1b7837", "#762a83"),  # 第2个  c("#4393c3", "#d6604d"),  # 第3个  c("#92c5de", "#f4a582")   # 第4个  )` HeatmapLabelOrient Numeric (default = 0) Rotation angle (degrees) heatmap axis labels (ID/Type). Use avoid overlap top/bottom labels; e.g. 45 90. SigLineWidth Numeric vector length 2 (default = c(0.5, 2)) Controls minimum maximum line width species–environment links, scaled significance (p-value). Smaller p leads thicker lines. SigLineColor Character vector (length 2, default = c("#fdbb84", "#d7301f")) Colors used species–environment link color gradient, corresponding low high correlation values respectively. HeatmapPointSize Numeric (default = 5) Point size heatmap diagonal nodes. CorePointSize Numeric (default = 8.5) Point size central species nodes. HeatmapPointFill Character (default = "#de77ae") Fill color heatmap diagonal points. CorePointFill Character (default = "#41b6c4") Fill color central species nodes. HeatmapTileColor Character NA (default = NA) Border color heatmap tiles (passed `geom_tile(colour=...)`). HeatmapTileSize Numeric (default = 0) Border line width heatmap tiles (passed `geom_tile(size=...)`). HeatmapScale Numeric (default = 1) Global scale factor overall heatmap size. Values > 1 enlarge whole heatmap layout, values < 1 shrink . SigLineAlpha Numeric (default = 0.5) Transparency species-network heatmap link lines. Must 0 1. fontsize Numeric (default = 5) (Deprecated) Use `HeatmapLabelSize` instead. orientation Character Character vector defining heatmap quadrants display. Can include combination `"top_right"`, `"bottom_right"`, `"top_left"`, `"bottom_left"`. r Numeric radius central species layout (plot units). group_layout Character (default = "circle"). Arrangement multiple species networks spec_select multiple elements. Options: "circle", "row", "column", "square", "diamond", "triangle", "triangle_down", "snake". anchor_dist Numeric (default = 6). Distance species networks multiple spec_select blocks used. scale_networks Logical (default = TRUE). TRUE, normalize species network scale (radius r) placing anchors. FALSE, r minimum network radius; larger networks scale proportionally node count. nrow Integer (default = NULL). Number rows group_layout = "row", "column", "snake". ncol Integer (default = NULL). Number columns group_layout = "row", "column", "snake".

title: Compute Zi-Pi (within-module connectivity and participation coefficient) — ggnetview_zipi
text: Zi (within-module connectivity): Reflects strongly node connected within module. Higher values indicate node connections within module may play core role inside . Pi (among-module connectivity): Measures much node connects modules. Higher values indicate node acts bridge modules, facilitating information, material energy flow across network. Node roles (default thresholds Zi=2.5, Pi=0.62): Module hubs: High Zi, low Pi. Core members within module,     important module stability function, weakly connected     modules. Connectors: Low Zi, high Pi. prominent within module,     strongly connect across modules, acting bridges. Network hubs: High Zi, high Pi. Core nodes within     across modules, critical overall network structure stability. Peripherals: Low Zi, low Pi. Peripheral satellite nodes     connections within across modules.

title: Compute Zi-Pi (within-module connectivity and participation coefficient) — ggnetview_zipi
text: Guimera R, Amaral LAN (2005). "Functional cartography complex metabolic   networks." Nature 433(7028):895–900.

title: Compute Zi-Pi (within-module connectivity and participation coefficient) — ggnetview_zipi
